title: Date Night Disaster
theme: Romance collapses under confident, terrible decisions.

modifiers.label: Romantic Momentum
modifiers.description: The bit has started reading as sincere, which is now everyone's problem.

modifiers.label: Fraud Energy
modifiers.description: The room keeps solving tension with lies and public commitments.

modifiers.label: Dessert Chaos
modifiers.description: Sugar has replaced caution as the decision-making framework.

modifiers.label: Too Many Witnesses
modifiers.description: Strangers are now emotionally invested in the outcome.

nodes.prompt: Halfway through your date, the restaurant lights cut out and a violinist keeps playing.
nodes.resultText: {{spotlight}} ends up carrying the accidental drama while the room decides how hard to commit to it.

socialPrompt.prompt: Who in this room would make this date way more embarrassing?
socialPrompt.voteIntro: The room picked {{spotlight}}. Decide what romantic disaster to pin on them.
socialPrompt.receiptTemplate: {{count}} players said {{spotlight}} would make this date dramatically worse.

choices.label: Make {{spotlight}} propose as a bit
choices.resultText: {{spotlight}} commits to the biggest possible joke and instantly makes it everyone's problem.

choices.label: Make {{spotlight}} blame the moon
choices.resultText: {{spotlight}} hands full responsibility to the night sky and hopes charisma does the rest.

choices.label: Make {{spotlight}} steal dessert first
choices.resultText: {{spotlight}} turns romance into lava cake theft and a wildly confident spoon plan.

nodes.prompt: The next table starts cheering while {{spotlight}} is still visibly in the bit, and someone offers to livestream the moment.
nodes.resultText: The room weaponizes secondhand intimacy and leaves {{spotlight}} on camera.

choices.label: Make {{spotlight}} commit to the speech
choices.resultText: {{spotlight}} makes the fake proposal so detailed that nobody can tell when the bit ended.

choices.label: Make {{spotlight}} crowdfund the ring
choices.resultText: {{spotlight}} turns romance into a live fundraiser and kills the mood on contact.

nodes.prompt: {{spotlight}}'s date asks whether this line works often for them.
nodes.resultText: The room chooses whether {{spotlight}} should fail with charm or fail with honesty.

roundTemplate.privatePrompt: Who in this room could keep this date alive for another minute?
roundTemplate.voteIntro: The room thinks {{spotlight}} can still save this. Decide how they try.
roundTemplate.receiptTemplate: {{count}} players privately said {{spotlight}} could talk their way through this.

choices.label: Have {{spotlight}} say it never misses
choices.resultText: {{spotlight}} doubles down with impossible confidence and turns the date into a legend by force.

choices.label: Make {{spotlight}} pivot into astrology
choices.resultText: {{spotlight}} calls an audible into zodiac discourse and the evening never recovers.

nodes.prompt: The waiter catches {{spotlight}} holding two spoons and an entire lava cake.
nodes.resultText: The room turns {{spotlight}}'s dessert theft into relationship lore.

choices.label: Tell {{spotlight}} to offer a bite
choices.resultText: {{spotlight}} makes the stolen cake intimate enough to become relationship canon.

choices.label: Make {{spotlight}} claim emotional support cake
choices.resultText: {{spotlight}} delivers such a bad legal defense for dessert theft that it becomes the whole evening.

nodes.prompt: A live pianist asks if he should keep underscoring your proposal speech.

promptVariants.text: A live pianist has already started underscoring your proposal speech because the room sold the bit too well.

nodes.resultText: The room chooses between sincere escalation and theatrical bankruptcy.

choices.label: Add vows for dramatic texture
choices.resultText: The room starts improvising promises like contract law with candlelight.

choices.label: Ask strangers to officiate
choices.resultText: The room crowdsources commitment from people who just wanted dinner.

nodes.prompt: A stranger actually Venmos ring money and asks for an update thread.
nodes.resultText: The room decides whether to reward delusion or flee from accountability.

choices.label: Post milestone updates
choices.resultText: The room turns private nonsense into serialized content.

choices.label: Spend it all on dessert tower diplomacy
choices.resultText: Fraud becomes pastry-based and somehow more romantic.

nodes.prompt: Your date asks for a second line and the violinist is still somehow following you.
nodes.resultText: The room can either lock in the charm or collapse under witness pressure.

roundTemplate.privatePrompt: Who in this room could somehow keep this date alive for one more terrible minute?
roundTemplate.voteIntro: The room thinks {{spotlight}} can still improvise romance here. Decide how they try.
roundTemplate.receiptTemplate: {{count}} players privately said {{spotlight}} could keep the bit alive.

choices.label: Invent a destiny anecdote
choices.resultText: The room manufactures history like it can be fact-checked later.

choices.label: Pretend this is all a surprise flash mob
choices.resultText: The room expands one lie into a full production.

nodes.prompt: Astrology lands harder than expected and now your date wants a cosmic compatibility demo.
nodes.resultText: The room chooses between intimacy theater and celestial fraud.

roundTemplate.privatePrompt: Privately, what would you actually do here?
roundTemplate.voteIntro: Privately, the room leaned {{option}}. Now decide what the date-night group actually commits to.
roundTemplate.receiptTemplate: {{count}} players privately picked {{option}} before the room made it official.

choices.label: Read the moon with confidence
choices.resultText: You explain the stars like customer service for fate.

choices.label: Order matching drinks for the signs
choices.resultText: The room turns mysticism into a paired beverage program.

nodes.prompt: The stolen dessert moment becomes so weirdly intimate that the waiter offers free champagne.
nodes.resultText: The room has to decide whether to reward the vibe or confess the theft.

choices.label: Toast to mutual bad judgment
choices.resultText: The room finds chemistry in the exact wrong place.

choices.label: Pitch a shared dessert startup
choices.resultText: The room monetizes intimacy before it stabilizes.

nodes.prompt: The manager appears holding a comped tiramisu and a concern for public decorum.
nodes.resultText: The room chooses between apology theater and louder cake crime.

roundTemplate.privatePrompt: Choose the hidden agenda you want to push before the room goes public.
roundTemplate.voteIntro: Hidden agendas are locked. Decide what this date-night disaster officially becomes.
roundTemplate.receiptTemplate: {{count}} players secretly pushed {{option}} before the room performed confidence.
roundTemplate.distributionIntro: {{count}} private reads pushed {{option}} before anyone talked to the manager.

choices.label: Turn the apology into a toast
choices.resultText: The room mistakes consequences for a setup line.

choices.label: Escalate to dessert tasting menu
choices.resultText: The room responds to scrutiny with sugar-fueled ambition.

nodes.prompt: The whole restaurant now assumes an engagement announcement is coming any second.

promptVariants.text: The whole restaurant now assumes this is a real engagement and has started recording from better angles.

nodes.resultText: The room chooses whether to cross the line or fully erase it.

roundTemplate.privatePrompt: Who in this room should take the fall if this fake engagement becomes public history?
roundTemplate.voteIntro: The room picked {{spotlight}}. Decide how hard to lock them into the lie.
roundTemplate.receiptTemplate: {{count}} players quietly pushed {{spotlight}} toward the engagement fallout.

choices.label: Produce a fake timeline of your love story
choices.resultText: The room tells a complete relationship origin story with zero supporting evidence.

choices.label: Announce the wedding hashtag
choices.resultText: The room builds a digital monument to a joke in real time.

nodes.prompt: A nearby table offers to pay for your drinks if the night ends in 'something memorable.'
nodes.resultText: The room now has sponsors, which is the least romantic possible development.

choices.label: Take the money and stage a moonlit exit
choices.resultText: The room accidentally lands on cinematic disaster with excellent lighting.

choices.label: Turn the whole room into witnesses
choices.resultText: You upgrade dinner strangers into chorus members of the bit.

nodes.prompt: The dessert tower diplomacy somehow attracts a local food influencer.

promptVariants.text: The dessert tower diplomacy attracts a local food influencer who calls your chemistry 'deeply suspicious, but watchable.'

nodes.resultText: The room chooses whether to become iconic or litigable.

roundTemplate.privatePrompt: Privately, what would you actually do once the influencer locks onto the table?
roundTemplate.voteIntro: Privately, the room leaned {{option}}. Now decide what the whole table actually commits to.
roundTemplate.receiptTemplate: {{count}} players privately picked {{option}} before the room made it content.
roundTemplate.distributionIntro: {{count}} private reads clustered around {{option}} before the influencer hit post.

choices.label: Lean into couple branding
choices.resultText: The room productizes flirtation at alarming speed.

choices.label: Offer the influencer first dance rights
choices.resultText: The room turns dinner into a multi-party spectacle.

nodes.prompt: The flash mob lie gets out of hand and now the staff wants your cue for the finale.
nodes.resultText: The room must either cash in the lie or get crushed beneath it.

choices.label: Cue confetti and commit
choices.resultText: The room transforms embarrassment into event design.

choices.label: Pretend the finale is a strategic retreat
choices.resultText: The room withdraws with exactly zero dignity.

nodes.prompt: The room hesitates so long that the violinist takes over and loudly declares this a once-in-a-lifetime romance activation.
nodes.resultText: Audience intervention arrives by making the evening much more public than anyone intended.

choices.label: Use the spotlight to fake sincerity
choices.resultText: The room borrows confidence from an artist who should have left already.

choices.label: Redirect everyone toward dessert
choices.resultText: You solve emotional pressure with sugar and movement.

nodes.prompt: A jeweler at the bar hears the speech, opens a travel case, and offers you a 'sponsorship ring' on commission.
nodes.resultText: The room acquires access to props that make the bit impossible to contain.

choices.label: Take the ring and keep going
choices.resultText: The room upgrades the lie with hardware.

choices.label: Trade the ring for a dramatic getaway
choices.resultText: The room turns jewelry into mobility.

nodes.prompt: A wedding party in the private room next door mistakes your table for the warm-up act and sends over a photographer.
nodes.resultText: The room is now operating with professional documentation against its will.

choices.label: Pose like it was planned
choices.resultText: The room converts panic into posture.

choices.label: Ask for edited proofs before dessert
choices.resultText: You try to control the narrative before the narrative exists.

nodes.prompt: You leave the restaurant engaged to a joke that nobody can safely undo without disappointing fifty witnesses.
The hashtag trends locally, the date survives somehow, and both of you now have to live inside an avoidable legend.
The night ends with stolen dessert, free drinks, and a suspicious amount of genuine chemistry.
Restaurant staff carry you into the street like newlyweds while both of you are still trying to remember each other's last names.
The date ends with a comped tiramisu, three deleted apps, and a permanent ban from themed dining.
